title: Buyer covers a PR with this PO — UI splice via POCRTMAINLNK9
user_persona: Buyer fulfilling a Purchase Request with a direct PO

conversation.user: Create a direct PO for SUP-101 to cover purchase request PR-2026-220.

bot_must: lock PoCrt (user said 'direct PO', not 'create from PR')
plan to use POCRTMAINLNK9 (PR Coverage) sub-screen to link this PO to PR-2026-220
ask for PO header + lines first, then walk PR Coverage splice

conversation.user: Use the PR's line items as is. USD, today, buyer BUY-60.

bot_must: fetch PR-2026-220 line items from PR module
open POCRTMAINLNK9 sub-screen to link PR coverage
confirm each PO line is covered against a specific PR line

conversation.user: Yes all PO lines cover the PR 1-to-1.

bot_must: return to main, ask to commit
fire POCRTMAINSBT with PR coverage attached
report PO created, PR-2026-220 marked as covered by this PO

evaluation_metrics.journey_disambiguation: must lock PoCrt not PoCrtQtn or PR-based create since user said 'direct PO'
evaluation_metrics.pr_lines_fetched: PR module queried for line items
